qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: HTTP server missing ReadHeaderTimeout enables Slowloris DoS attack
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different root cause: this finding concerns HTTP header read timeouts and Slowloris-style connection exhaustion, not grpc-go malformed gRPC :path handling or path-based deny-rule bypass.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: ForwardedHeaders insecure mode allows IP spoofing bypassing IP-based access controls
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different root cause: this finding depends on trusting attacker-controlled X-Forwarded-* headers in ForwardedHeaders insecure mode, not grpc-go routing of malformed slashless gRPC :path values past path authorization interceptors.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: API and dashboard endpoints exposed without authentication when insecure mode enabled
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different root cause: this finding concerns API.Insecure exposing Traefik API/dashboard endpoints without authentication, not grpc-go malformed gRPC :path canonicalization and deny-rule bypass.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: ForwardAuth unlimited response body size enables DoS via memory exhaustion
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different root cause: this finding concerns ForwardAuth buffering an oversized authentication-service response, not malformed gRPC :path handling in grpc-go authorization logic.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described vulnerable code or root cause. The advisory is a Traefik exposure to grpc-go CVE-2026-33186, where malformed HTTP/2 gRPC :path pseudo-headers lacking a leading slash are routed but evaluated raw by path authorization logic, bypassing deny rules when a fallback allow rule exists. The qualifying findings address unrelated Traefik configuration or resource-consumption issues.
evidence: Advisory GHSA-46wh-3698-f2cx describes an affected grpc-go dependency and a slashless gRPC :path deny-rule bypass.
vuln_http_slowloris reports missing ReadHeaderTimeout and Slowloris-style HTTP connection exhaustion.
vuln_forwardedheaders_ip_spoofing reports trusted X-Forwarded-* header spoofing in ForwardedHeaders insecure mode.
vuln_api_insecure_default reports unauthenticated API/dashboard exposure when API.Insecure is enabled.
vuln_forwardauth_dos reports unbounded ForwardAuth response body buffering.
blockers_to_higher_tier: No advisory-matched qualifying finding was present, so no selected finding or advisory-specific PoC execution is applicable.
